word-counter.name: ตัวนับคำ
word-counter.description: นับคำ ตัวอักษร ประโยค และย่อหน้าในข้อความของคุณทันที
word-counter.metaTitle: ตัวนับคำ - เครื่องมือนับคำและตัวอักษรออนไลน์ฟรี
word-counter.metaDescription: นับคำ ตัวอักษร ประโยค และย่อหน้าได้ทันที เครื่องมือออนไลน์ฟรี ไม่ต้องสมัครสมาชิก ทำงานในเบราว์เซอร์ทั้งหมด
word-counter.keywords: ตัวนับคำ, นับตัวอักษร, วิเคราะห์ข้อความ, นับคำออนไลน์
word-counter.placeholder: พิมพ์หรือวางข้อความที่นี่...
word-counter.readingTime: เวลาในการอ่าน

faq.q1: ตัวนับคำทำงานอย่างไร?
faq.a1: วางหรือพิมพ์ข้อความของคุณแล้วจะได้ผลลัพธ์การนับคำ ตัวอักษร ประโยค และย่อหน้าทันที การประมวลผลทั้งหมดเกิดขึ้นในเบราว์เซอร์ของคุณ — ไม่มีการอัปโหลดใดๆ
faq.q2: มีจำกัดจำนวนตัวอักษรไหม?
faq.a2: ไม่ เครื่องมือนี้ประมวลผลข้อความทุกความยาวโดยตรงในเบราว์เซอร์ของคุณโดยไม่มีข้อจำกัด
faq.q3: เวลาในการอ่านคำนวณอย่างไร?
faq.a3: เวลาในการอ่านประมาณที่ 200 คำต่อนาที ซึ่งเป็นความเร็วเฉลี่ยในการอ่านของผู้ใหญ่

case-converter.name: ตัวแปลงตัวพิมพ์
case-converter.description: แปลงข้อความระหว่าง UPPERCASE, lowercase, Title Case, camelCase และอื่นๆ
case-converter.metaTitle: ตัวแปลงตัวพิมพ์ - เครื่องมือเปลี่ยนตัวพิมพ์ออนไลน์ฟรี
case-converter.metaDescription: แปลงข้อความเป็น UPPERCASE, lowercase, Title Case, camelCase, snake_case และอื่นๆ เครื่องมือออนไลน์ฟรี ไม่ต้องสมัครสมาชิก
case-converter.keywords: ตัวแปลงตัวพิมพ์, ตัวพิมพ์ใหญ่, ตัวพิมพ์เล็ก, title case, camelCase, snake_case
case-converter.placeholder: พิมพ์หรือวางข้อความที่นี่...
case-converter.title: Title Case

faq.q1: รองรับรูปแบบตัวพิมพ์ใดบ้าง?
faq.a1: เรารองรับ UPPERCASE, lowercase, Title Case, Sentence case, camelCase, PascalCase, snake_case, kebab-case และ CONSTANT_CASE
faq.q2: สามารถแปลงชื่อตัวแปรในโค้ดได้ไหม?
faq.a2: ได้! ใช้การแปลง camelCase, PascalCase, snake_case หรือ kebab-case สำหรับชื่อตัวแปรในการเขียนโปรแกรม

lorem-ipsum.name: ตัวสร้าง Lorem Ipsum
lorem-ipsum.description: สร้างข้อความตัวอย่างตามย่อหน้า ประโยค หรือคำ
lorem-ipsum.metaTitle: ตัวสร้าง Lorem Ipsum - เครื่องมือสร้างข้อความตัวอย่างฟรี
lorem-ipsum.metaDescription: สร้างข้อความตัวอย่าง Lorem Ipsum ตามย่อหน้า ประโยค หรือคำ เครื่องมือออนไลน์ฟรีสำหรับนักออกแบบและนักพัฒนา
lorem-ipsum.keywords: ตัวสร้าง lorem ipsum, ข้อความตัวอย่าง, ข้อความจำลอง, ข้อความเติม
lorem-ipsum.startWithLorem: เริ่มต้นด้วย "Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet..."

faq.q1: Lorem Ipsum คืออะไร?
faq.a1: Lorem Ipsum คือข้อความตัวอย่างที่ใช้กันทั่วไปในงานออกแบบและสิ่งพิมพ์เพื่อเติมพื้นที่ที่จะมีเนื้อหาจริงในภายหลัง
faq.q2: สามารถปรับแต่งผลลัพธ์ได้ไหม?
faq.a2: ได้ คุณสามารถเลือกสร้างตามย่อหน้า ประโยค หรือคำ กำหนดจำนวน และเลือกเริ่มต้นด้วยข้อความ Lorem Ipsum แบบดั้งเดิมได้

json-formatter.name: ตัวจัดรูปแบบ JSON
json-formatter.description: จัดรูปแบบ ตรวจสอบ และย่อข้อมูล JSON พร้อมการเน้นสีไวยากรณ์
json-formatter.metaTitle: ตัวจัดรูปแบบและตรวจสอบ JSON - เครื่องมือ JSON ออนไลน์ฟรี
json-formatter.metaDescription: จัดรูปแบบ ตรวจสอบ และย่อข้อมูล JSON พร้อมการเน้นสีไวยากรณ์ เครื่องมือออนไลน์ฟรีที่ทำงานในเบราว์เซอร์ทั้งหมด
json-formatter.keywords: ตัวจัดรูปแบบ json, ตัวตรวจสอบ json, json beautifier, json minifier, json pretty print
json-formatter.inputPlaceholder: วาง JSON ของคุณที่นี่...
json-formatter.invalid: JSON ไม่ถูกต้อง
json-formatter.indentSpaces: จำนวนช่องว่างย่อหน้า

faq.q1: เครื่องมือนี้ทำอะไรได้บ้าง?
faq.a1: จัดรูปแบบ (pretty-print) ข้อมูล JSON ด้วยการย่อหน้าที่ถูกต้อง ตรวจสอบไวยากรณ์ JSON และสามารถย่อ JSON โดยลบช่องว่าง
faq.q2: ข้อมูลของฉันปลอดภัยไหม?
faq.a2: ปลอดภัย การประมวลผลทั้งหมดเกิดขึ้นในเบราว์เซอร์ของคุณ ข้อมูลของคุณไม่เคยออกจากอุปกรณ์

base64.name: เข้ารหัส/ถอดรหัส Base64
base64.description: เข้ารหัสข้อความเป็น Base64 หรือถอดรหัส Base64 กลับเป็นข้อความ
base64.metaTitle: ตัวเข้ารหัส/ถอดรหัส Base64 - เครื่องมือ Base64 ออนไลน์ฟรี
base64.metaDescription: เข้ารหัสข้อความเป็น Base64 หรือถอดรหัสสตริง Base64 กลับเป็นข้อความ เครื่องมือออนไลน์ฟรี ทำงานในเบราว์เซอร์ทั้งหมด
base64.keywords: เข้ารหัส base64, ถอดรหัส base64, ตัวแปลง base64, base64 ออนไลน์
base64.inputPlaceholder: ป้อนข้อความหรือสตริง Base64...

faq.q1: การเข้ารหัส Base64 คืออะไร?
faq.a1: Base64 เป็นรูปแบบการเข้ารหัสไบนารีเป็นข้อความที่แปลงข้อมูลไบนารีเป็นอักขระ ASCII ใช้กันทั่วไปในข้อมูล URL, ไฟล์แนบอีเมล และเนื้อหา API
faq.q2: สามารถเข้ารหัสไฟล์ได้ไหม?
faq.a2: ปัจจุบันเครื่องมือนี้เข้ารหัสและถอดรหัสข้อความ การเข้ารหัสไฟล์ Base64 จะพร้อมใช้งานในการอัปเดตในอนาคต

url-encoder.name: เข้ารหัส/ถอดรหัส URL
url-encoder.description: เข้ารหัสหรือถอดรหัสส่วนประกอบ URL เพื่อใช้งานอย่างปลอดภัยในที่อยู่เว็บ
url-encoder.metaTitle: ตัวเข้ารหัส/ถอดรหัส URL - เครื่องมือเข้ารหัส URL ออนไลน์ฟรี
url-encoder.metaDescription: เข้ารหัสหรือถอดรหัสส่วนประกอบ URL แปลงอักขระพิเศษเพื่อใช้งานอย่างปลอดภัยในที่อยู่เว็บ เครื่องมือออนไลน์ฟรี
url-encoder.keywords: เข้ารหัส url, ถอดรหัส url, ตัวเข้ารหัส url, percent encoding, เข้ารหัส uri
url-encoder.inputPlaceholder: ป้อน URL หรือข้อความเพื่อเข้ารหัส/ถอดรหัส...
url-encoder.encodeComponent: เข้ารหัสส่วนประกอบ
url-encoder.decodeComponent: ถอดรหัสส่วนประกอบ

faq.q1: การเข้ารหัส URL คืออะไร?
faq.a1: การเข้ารหัส URL แปลงอักขระพิเศษเป็นรูปแบบ percent-encoded (เช่น ช่องว่างกลายเป็น %20) เพื่อให้สามารถใช้งานได้อย่างปลอดภัยในที่อยู่เว็บ
faq.q2: ความแตกต่างระหว่างเข้ารหัสและเข้ารหัสส่วนประกอบคืออะไร?
faq.a2: เข้ารหัสจะแปลง URL ทั้งหมดโดยรักษาอักขระโครงสร้างเช่น / และ ? ไว้ เข้ารหัสส่วนประกอบจะเข้ารหัสทุกอย่างรวมถึงอักขระเหล่านั้น เหมาะสำหรับค่าพารามิเตอร์ของคิวรี

ocr.name: OCR Text Recognition
ocr.description: Extract text from images using optical character recognition.
ocr.metaTitle: OCR - Free Online Image to Text Converter
ocr.metaDescription: Extract text from images using OCR. Supports multiple languages. Free online tool.
ocr.keywords: ocr, image to text, text recognition, optical character recognition

faq.a1: Over 12 languages including English, Chinese (Simplified/Traditional), Japanese, Korean, Spanish, French, German, and more.
faq.q2: How accurate is the OCR?
faq.a2: Accuracy depends on image quality and text clarity. Clear, high-resolution images with good contrast produce the best results.

archive.name: ZIP Extractor
archive.description: Extract and preview ZIP archive contents online.
archive.metaTitle: ZIP Extractor - Free Online Archive Viewer
archive.metaDescription: Extract and preview ZIP files online. Browse contents and download individual files. Free online tool.
archive.keywords: zip extractor, unzip online, extract zip, archive viewer
archive.unsupportedFormat: Unsupported archive format. Currently only ZIP files are supported.

faq.a1: Currently ZIP files are fully supported. Files are extracted entirely in your browser.
faq.q2: Can I download individual files from an archive?
faq.a2: Yes, you can browse the archive contents and download any individual file by clicking its download button.

csv-json.name: CSV/JSON Converter
csv-json.description: Convert between CSV and JSON formats instantly.
csv-json.metaTitle: CSV to JSON / JSON to CSV - Free Online Converter
csv-json.metaDescription: Convert CSV data to JSON or JSON to CSV format. Handles quoted fields, nested data. Free online tool.
csv-json.keywords: csv to json, json to csv, csv converter, json converter, data converter
csv-json.csvPlaceholder:
Paste CSV data here...
name,age,city
Alice,30,NYC

faq.a1: Standard comma-separated values with optional double-quote escaping. Fields containing commas, quotes, or newlines are handled correctly.
faq.q2: Does it support nested JSON?
faq.a2: JSON to CSV works best with flat arrays of objects. Nested objects are converted to their string representation.

hash-generator.name: Hash Generator
hash-generator.description: Compute SHA-1, SHA-256, SHA-384, and SHA-512 hashes for text or files.
hash-generator.metaTitle: Hash Generator - Free Online SHA Hash Calculator
hash-generator.metaDescription: Generate SHA-1, SHA-256, SHA-384, and SHA-512 hashes for text and files. Uses Web Crypto API. Free online tool.
hash-generator.keywords: hash generator, sha256, sha512, sha1, file hash, checksum calculator

faq.a1: SHA-1, SHA-256, SHA-384, and SHA-512 are all computed simultaneously using the browser's Web Crypto API.
faq.q2: Can I hash files?
faq.a2: Yes, switch to File mode and drop any file. The hash is computed locally in your browser — the file is never uploaded.

color-converter.name: Color Converter
color-converter.description: Convert colors between HEX, RGB, and HSL formats with live preview.
color-converter.metaTitle: Color Converter - Free Online HEX/RGB/HSL Tool
color-converter.metaDescription: Convert colors between HEX, RGB, and HSL formats. Live color preview swatch. Free online tool.
color-converter.keywords: color converter, hex to rgb, rgb to hsl, color picker, color format
color-converter.invalidColor: Could not parse color. Try HEX (#ff6600), RGB (rgb(255,102,0)), or HSL (hsl(24,100%,50%)).

faq.a1: You can input colors as HEX (#ff6600 or #f60), RGB (rgb(255, 102, 0)), or HSL (hsl(24, 100%, 50%)). All other formats are shown automatically.
faq.q2: Does it support alpha/transparency?
faq.a2: Currently the tool supports opaque colors only. RGBA and HSLA support will be added in a future update.

json-xml.name: JSON ↔ XML Converter
json-xml.description: Convert between JSON and XML formats.
json-xml.metaTitle: JSON to XML / XML to JSON - Free Online Converter
json-xml.metaDescription: Convert JSON to XML or XML to JSON instantly. Free online tool that works in your browser.
json-xml.keywords: json to xml, xml to json, json xml converter, data format converter

faq.q1: How is JSON mapped to XML?
faq.a1: Object keys become XML element names. Arrays produce repeated elements with the same name. Primitive values become text content.
faq.q2: Does it preserve XML attributes?
faq.a2: XML attributes are not preserved in the JSON output. Only element names and text content are converted.

markdown-preview.name: Markdown Preview
markdown-preview.description: Write Markdown and see a live HTML preview side by side.
markdown-preview.metaTitle: Markdown Preview - Free Online Markdown Editor
markdown-preview.metaDescription: Write Markdown with live HTML preview. Free online tool for developers and writers.
markdown-preview.keywords: markdown preview, markdown editor, markdown to html, markdown viewer
markdown-preview.markdownPlaceholder:
Write Markdown here...

# Heading

**Bold** and *italic* text.

faq.a1: Headings, bold, italic, links, images, code blocks, inline code, unordered lists, blockquotes, and horizontal rules.
faq.q2: Can I copy the HTML output?
faq.a2: Yes, use the Copy HTML button to copy the generated HTML to your clipboard.

regex-tester.name: Regex Tester
regex-tester.description: Test regular expressions with real-time matching and highlighting.
regex-tester.metaTitle: Regex Tester - Free Online Regular Expression Tester
regex-tester.metaDescription: Test regex patterns with real-time matching, highlighting, and match details. Free online tool.
regex-tester.keywords: regex tester, regular expression, regex online, regex matcher, pattern tester

faq.a1: Global (g), case-insensitive (i), multiline (m), and dotAll (s) flags are available.
faq.q2: Does it support named capture groups?
faq.a2: Yes, named groups defined with (?<name>...) are displayed in the match details.

timestamp.name: Unix Timestamp Converter
timestamp.description: Convert between Unix timestamps and human-readable dates.
timestamp.metaTitle: Unix Timestamp Converter - Free Online Epoch Converter
timestamp.metaDescription: Convert Unix timestamps to dates and dates to timestamps. Shows UTC, local, ISO 8601, and relative formats.
timestamp.keywords: unix timestamp, epoch converter, timestamp to date, date to timestamp, unix time

faq.a1: A Unix timestamp is the number of seconds that have elapsed since January 1, 1970 00:00:00 UTC (the Unix epoch).
faq.q2: Does it handle millisecond timestamps?
faq.a2: Yes. If you enter a number larger than 10^12, it is automatically treated as milliseconds instead of seconds.

yaml-json.name: YAML ↔ JSON Converter
yaml-json.description: Convert between YAML and JSON formats.
yaml-json.metaTitle: YAML to JSON / JSON to YAML - Free Online Converter
yaml-json.metaDescription: Convert YAML to JSON or JSON to YAML instantly. Free online tool that works in your browser.
yaml-json.keywords: yaml to json, json to yaml, yaml json converter, yaml parser, data format converter
yaml-json.yamlPlaceholder:
Paste YAML here...

name: example
version: 1.0
items:
  - one
  - two

faq.a1: All standard YAML features including nested objects, arrays, multi-line strings, and anchors/aliases via the js-yaml library.
faq.q2: Does conversion preserve comments?
faq.a2: No. YAML comments are stripped during parsing. When converting JSON to YAML the output is clean YAML without comments.

text-diff.name: Text Diff
text-diff.description: Compare two texts and see line-by-line differences.
text-diff.metaTitle: Text Diff - Free Online Text Comparison Tool
text-diff.metaDescription: Compare two texts side by side and see additions, removals, and unchanged lines. Free online diff tool.
text-diff.keywords: text diff, text compare, diff tool, compare text online, line diff

faq.a1: A line-based Longest Common Subsequence (LCS) algorithm that identifies additions, removals, and unchanged lines.
faq.q2: Can I copy the diff output?
faq.a2: Yes, use the copy button to copy a unified diff format with + and - prefixes for additions and removals.

format-converter.name: ตัวแปลงรูปแบบรูปภาพ
format-converter.description: แปลงรูปภาพระหว่างรูปแบบ WebP, PNG, JPG และ ICO
format-converter.metaTitle: ตัวแปลงรูปแบบรูปภาพ - เครื่องมือแปลง WebP/PNG/JPG/ICO ออนไลน์ฟรี
format-converter.metaDescription: แปลงรูปภาพระหว่างรูปแบบ WebP, PNG, JPG และ ICO เครื่องมือออนไลน์ฟรี ไม่ต้องอัปโหลด รูปภาพของคุณอยู่ในเบราว์เซอร์

compress.name: Image Compressor

compress.metaTitle: Image Compressor - Free Online Image Compression Tool
compress.metaDescription: Compress images to reduce file size. Supports batch compression with quality control. Free online tool.
compress.keywords: image compressor, compress image, reduce image size, image optimization

faq.a1: The tool reduces image file size using lossy compression. You can control quality and maximum size. All processing happens in your browser.
faq.q2: Which formats are supported?
faq.a2: Supports JPEG, PNG, WebP, GIF, and BMP images for compression.

crop.name: Image Crop
crop.description: Crop images with precision using an interactive cropping tool.
crop.metaTitle: Image Crop - Free Online Image Cropper
crop.metaDescription: Crop images with precision. Choose aspect ratios or crop freely. Free online tool.
crop.keywords: image crop, crop image online, image cropper, photo crop

faq.q1: Can I set a specific aspect ratio?
faq.a1: Yes, you can choose from preset ratios (1:1, 4:3, 16:9, 3:2) or use free-form cropping.
faq.q2: Is the original image modified?
faq.a2: No, your original image is never modified. A new cropped image is created for download.

resize.name: Image Resize
resize.description: Resize images to any dimension with aspect ratio lock.
resize.metaTitle: Image Resize - Free Online Image Resizer
resize.metaDescription: Resize images to custom dimensions. Lock aspect ratio, use presets for social media. Free online tool.
resize.keywords: image resize, resize image online, image resizer, change image size

faq.q1: Can I maintain the aspect ratio?
faq.a1: Yes, the aspect ratio is locked by default. Click the link icon to unlock it for free-form resizing.
faq.q2: What presets are available?
faq.a2: Common presets include HD (1280×720), Full HD (1920×1080), 4K (3840×2160), and social media sizes.

watermark.name: Add Watermark
watermark.description: Add text watermarks to images with customizable style and position.
watermark.metaTitle: Add Watermark to Image - Free Online Watermark Tool
watermark.metaDescription: Add text watermarks to your images. Customize font, color, opacity, and position. Free online tool.
watermark.keywords: add watermark, image watermark, text watermark, photo watermark

faq.q1: Can I tile watermarks across the entire image?
faq.a1: Yes, select the 'Tile (Repeat)' position option to add repeating watermarks at an angle across the entire image.
faq.q2: Can I adjust the watermark transparency?
faq.a2: Yes, use the opacity slider to control transparency from barely visible to fully opaque.

remove-exif.name: Remove EXIF Data
remove-exif.description: Strip EXIF metadata from photos to protect your privacy.
remove-exif.metaTitle: Remove EXIF Data - Free Online EXIF Remover
remove-exif.metaDescription: Remove EXIF metadata from images to protect privacy. Strip GPS location, camera info, and more. Free online tool.
remove-exif.keywords: remove exif, exif remover, strip metadata, photo privacy

faq.a1: All metadata is removed including GPS location, camera model, date taken, and other embedded information. The image is redrawn on a clean canvas.
faq.q2: Does this affect image quality?
faq.a2: The image quality is preserved at 95% for JPEG. PNG images are losslessly re-exported.

flip.name: Flip Image
flip.description: Flip images horizontally or vertically with one click.
flip.metaTitle: Flip Image - Free Online Image Flipper
flip.metaDescription: Flip images horizontally or vertically online for free. No upload needed, all processing happens in your browser.
flip.keywords: flip image, mirror image, horizontal flip, vertical flip

faq.q1: What is the difference between horizontal and vertical flip?
faq.a1: Horizontal flip mirrors the image left to right, like looking in a mirror. Vertical flip mirrors the image top to bottom.
faq.q2: Does flipping reduce image quality?
faq.a2: No. The image is redrawn at its original resolution. JPEG images are re-encoded at 92% quality.

grayscale.name: Grayscale Image
grayscale.description: Convert any image to grayscale (black and white).
grayscale.metaTitle: Grayscale Image - Free Online B&W Converter
grayscale.metaDescription: Convert color images to grayscale online for free. No upload needed, all processing happens in your browser.
grayscale.keywords: grayscale, black and white, desaturate, image converter

faq.a1: The tool uses the Canvas API grayscale filter to remove all color information, converting each pixel to a shade of gray based on its luminance.
faq.q2: Can I adjust the intensity of the grayscale effect?
faq.a2: This tool applies a full grayscale conversion. For partial desaturation, consider using a dedicated photo editor.

pixelate.name: Pixelate Image
pixelate.description: Apply a pixelation effect to any image with adjustable pixel size.
pixelate.metaTitle: Pixelate Image - Free Online Pixelation Tool
pixelate.metaDescription: Pixelate images online with adjustable block size. Great for censoring or creating retro effects. Free browser-based tool.
pixelate.keywords: pixelate image, mosaic effect, censor image, pixel art

faq.q1: What can I use pixelation for?
faq.a1: Pixelation is commonly used to censor sensitive information in screenshots, create retro pixel-art effects, or anonymize faces in photos.
faq.q2: Can I control the level of pixelation?
faq.a2: Yes. Use the pixel size slider to adjust from 2px (subtle) to 50px (heavy pixelation).

add-border.name: Add Border
add-border.description: Add a customizable border around any image.
add-border.metaTitle: Add Border to Image - Free Online Border Tool
add-border.metaDescription: Add borders to images with custom width and color. Free online tool, no upload needed.
add-border.keywords: add border, image border, photo frame, border maker

faq.a1: You can customize the border width from 1 to 100 pixels and choose any color using the color picker.
faq.q2: What format is the output?
faq.a2: The output is always PNG to ensure the border color is preserved exactly as chosen.

circle-crop.name: Circle Crop
circle-crop.description: Crop any image into a perfect circle with transparent background.
circle-crop.metaTitle: Circle Crop Image - Free Online Circle Cropper
circle-crop.metaDescription: Crop images into a circle with transparent background. Perfect for profile pictures and avatars. Free online tool.
circle-crop.keywords: circle crop, round image, avatar crop, profile picture

faq.a1: The tool takes the center of your image, uses the shortest dimension as the diameter, and clips it to a perfect circle. The background is transparent.
faq.q2: What format is the output?
faq.a2: The output is always PNG because it supports transparency, which is needed for the circular crop.

svg-to-png.name: SVG to PNG
svg-to-png.description: Convert SVG vector graphics to PNG raster images at any scale.
svg-to-png.metaTitle: SVG to PNG - Free Online SVG Converter
svg-to-png.metaDescription: Convert SVG files to PNG images with custom scale factor. Free browser-based tool, no upload needed.
svg-to-png.keywords: svg to png, svg converter, vector to raster, svg export

faq.a1: You can choose 1x (original size), 2x, 3x, or 4x. Higher scales produce larger, more detailed PNG files suitable for high-DPI displays.
faq.q2: Are all SVG features supported?
faq.a2: The tool renders SVGs using the browser's built-in SVG engine. Most standard SVG features are supported, but external resources or fonts may not render correctly.

add-text.name: Add Text to Image
add-text.description: Overlay text on images with customizable font size, color, and position.
add-text.metaTitle: Add Text to Image - Free Online Text Overlay Tool
add-text.metaDescription: Add text to images with custom font, color, size, and position. Free online tool.

faq.q1: Can I choose where the text appears?
faq.a1: Yes, choose from five positions: center, top-left, top-right, bottom-left, or bottom-right.
faq.q2: Which fonts are available?
faq.a2: The tool uses the browser's default sans-serif font, which varies by system but is always clean and readable.

combine.name: Combine Images

combine.metaDescription: Merge multiple images horizontally or vertically. Free online tool, no upload needed.

faq.a1: You can combine images horizontally (side by side) or vertically (stacked top to bottom).
faq.q2: Do images need to be the same size?
faq.a2: No, images of different sizes are combined at their original dimensions. The canvas expands to fit all images.

split.name: Split Image

split.metaDescription: Split images into a grid of equal pieces. Download individually or as ZIP. Free online tool.

faq.a2: Yes, use the Download All (ZIP) button to get all pieces in a single ZIP file.

heic-convert.metaDescription: Convert HEIC and HEIF images to JPG or PNG format. Free online tool, no upload needed. Works in your browser.
heic-convert.keywords: heic to jpg, heic to png, heif converter, iphone photo converter, heic converter online

faq.a1: HEIC (High Efficiency Image Container) is the default image format used by Apple devices. It offers better compression than JPEG while maintaining quality.

faq.a2: No. All conversion happens locally in your browser. Your files never leave your device.

collage.name: Image Collage

collage.metaDescription: Create photo collages with customizable grid layouts, gap, and background color. Free online tool, no upload needed.

faq.a2: No. All processing happens locally in your browser. Your files never leave your device.

faq.a1: Upload a PDF and click on the page thumbnails you want to remove. Selected pages are highlighted. Click the delete button to create a new PDF without those pages.

faq.a2: The original file is not modified. A new PDF is created without the selected pages. You can always re-upload the original.

to-image.metaDescription: Convert PDF pages to high-quality JPG or PNG images. Free online tool with adjustable DPI and quality.

images-to-pdf.name: Images to PDF

images-to-pdf.metaTitle: Images to PDF - Convert Images to PDF Online Free
images-to-pdf.metaDescription: Convert JPG, PNG, and other images into a single PDF document. Reorder pages, free online tool. No upload needed.

faq.a1: You can convert JPG, PNG, GIF, WebP, BMP, and other common image formats. Non-standard formats are automatically converted before embedding.
faq.q2: Can I reorder the images before converting?
faq.a2: Yes, use the arrow buttons on each image thumbnail to reorder them. The final PDF pages will match the order shown.

rotate.name: Rotate PDF
rotate.description: Rotate all pages of a PDF by 90, 180, or 270 degrees.
rotate.metaTitle: Rotate PDF - Rotate PDF Pages Online Free
rotate.metaDescription: Rotate PDF pages clockwise, counter-clockwise, or 180 degrees. Free online tool, works in your browser.

faq.q2: Does rotation affect the PDF content quality?
faq.a2: No, rotation only changes the page orientation metadata. The content, text, and images remain unchanged.

add-page-numbers.name: Add Page Numbers
add-page-numbers.description: Add page numbers to every page of a PDF document.
add-page-numbers.metaTitle: Add Page Numbers to PDF - Free Online Tool
add-page-numbers.metaDescription: Add page numbers to your PDF documents. Choose position, format, and font size. Free online tool, no upload needed.

faq.q1: Can I choose where page numbers appear?
faq.a1: Yes, you can place page numbers at any of six positions: top or bottom, combined with left, center, or right alignment.
faq.q2: Can I skip numbering on certain pages?
faq.a2: Yes, use the 'Start from page' option to skip the first N pages (useful for title pages or table of contents).

extract-text.name: Extract Text from PDF
extract-text.description: Extract all text content from a PDF document.
extract-text.metaTitle: Extract Text from PDF - Free Online PDF Text Extractor
extract-text.metaDescription: Extract text from PDF files instantly. Copy text content from any PDF document. Free online tool, works in your browser.
extract-text.keywords: extract text pdf, pdf to text, copy text from pdf, pdf text extractor
extract-text.noTextFound: No text content found in this PDF.

faq.q1: Does this work with scanned PDFs?
faq.a1: This tool extracts embedded text only. For scanned PDFs (images), use our OCR tool to recognize text from images.
faq.q2: Is the formatting preserved?
faq.a2: Basic text content is extracted page by page. Complex formatting like tables and columns may not be perfectly preserved.

rearrange.name: Rearrange PDF Pages
rearrange.description: Drag and drop to reorder pages in a PDF document.
rearrange.metaTitle: Rearrange PDF Pages - Free Online PDF Page Reorder Tool
rearrange.metaDescription: Reorder PDF pages by dragging and dropping. Free online tool, works in your browser.
rearrange.keywords: rearrange pdf, reorder pdf pages, pdf page order, sort pdf pages

faq.q1: How do I reorder PDF pages?
faq.a1: Upload a PDF, then use the arrow buttons to move pages up or down. Click Apply to create a new PDF with the new page order.
faq.q2: Is the original PDF modified?
faq.a2: No, a new PDF is created with the reordered pages. Your original file is never changed.

compress.name: Compress PDF
compress.description: Reduce PDF file size by re-rendering pages at lower quality.
compress.metaTitle: Compress PDF - Free Online PDF Compressor
compress.metaDescription: Compress PDF files to reduce size. Choose quality level. Free online tool, no upload needed.
compress.keywords: compress pdf, pdf compressor, reduce pdf size, shrink pdf

faq.a1: Pages are re-rendered as JPEG images at the chosen quality level and re-embedded. Lower quality means smaller files but reduced visual fidelity.
faq.q2: Will text remain selectable?
faq.a2: No, since pages are converted to images during compression, text is no longer selectable in the compressed PDF.

add-watermark.name: PDF Watermark
add-watermark.description: Add a diagonal text watermark to every page of a PDF.
add-watermark.metaTitle: Add Watermark to PDF - Free Online PDF Watermark Tool
add-watermark.metaDescription: Add text watermarks to PDF documents. Customize opacity and font size. Free online tool.
add-watermark.keywords: pdf watermark, add watermark pdf, stamp pdf, pdf text overlay

faq.q1: Can I customize the watermark appearance?
faq.a1: Yes, you can adjust the text, opacity (transparency), and font size. The watermark is placed diagonally across each page.
faq.q2: Is the watermark applied to all pages?
faq.a2: Yes, the same watermark is applied to every page of the PDF.

crop.name: Crop PDF
crop.description: Crop PDF pages by setting margins to remove from each side.
crop.metaTitle: Crop PDF - Free Online PDF Cropping Tool
crop.metaDescription: Crop PDF pages by removing margins from each side. Free online tool, works in your browser.
crop.keywords: crop pdf, trim pdf, pdf margins, pdf crop tool
crop.marginsHint: Enter the amount to crop from each side (1 point ≈ 0.35mm)

faq.a1: PDF uses points as its unit of measurement. 1 point = 1/72 inch ≈ 0.35mm. A standard US Letter page is 612 × 792 points.
faq.q2: Does cropping reduce file size?
faq.a2: Cropping changes the visible area but does not remove the hidden content, so file size may not decrease significantly.

esign.name: E-Sign PDF
esign.description: Draw a signature and place it on any page of a PDF document.
esign.metaTitle: E-Sign PDF - Free Online PDF Signature Tool
esign.metaDescription: Add your electronic signature to PDF documents. Draw your signature and place it on any page. Free online tool.
esign.keywords: esign pdf, sign pdf online, electronic signature pdf, pdf signature tool

faq.a1: No, everything happens in your browser. Your signature and PDF are never uploaded to any server.
faq.q2: Can I place the signature on a specific page?
faq.a2: Yes, you can choose which page to sign and set the exact position (X, Y coordinates) and size of the signature.

extract-images.name: Extract Images from PDF
extract-images.description: Extract all embedded images from a PDF file and download them.
extract-images.metaTitle: Extract Images from PDF - Free Online PDF Image Extractor
extract-images.metaDescription: Extract all images from PDF documents. Download individually or as a ZIP file. Free online tool.
extract-images.keywords: extract images pdf, pdf image extractor, get images from pdf, pdf to images
extract-images.noImagesFound: No images found in this PDF.

faq.a1: Images are extracted in their original format when possible (JPEG). Other images are converted to PNG format.
faq.q2: Does this tool extract all images?
faq.a2: It extracts embedded raster images from the PDF. Vector graphics and text rendered as paths are not extracted as separate images.

mute.name: Mute Video
mute.description: Remove audio from video files instantly.
mute.metaTitle: Mute Video - Remove Audio from Video Online
mute.metaDescription: Remove audio track from video files. Fast processing, no upload needed. Free online tool.
mute.keywords: mute video, remove audio from video, silent video, video no sound
mute.unsupported: This tool requires SharedArrayBuffer support. Please use a modern browser with HTTPS.

faq.a1: The tool removes the audio track from the video while keeping the video quality intact. No re-encoding is needed.
faq.q2: Which video formats are supported?
faq.a2: Most common formats including MP4, WebM, MOV, and AVI are supported.

trim.name: Trim Video
trim.description: Cut and trim video clips to the desired length.
trim.metaTitle: Trim Video - Cut Video Clips Online Free
trim.metaDescription: Trim and cut video clips to any length. Set start and end points with precision. Free online tool.
trim.keywords: trim video, cut video, video trimmer, video cutter online
trim.unsupported: This tool requires SharedArrayBuffer support. Please use a modern browser with HTTPS.

faq.a1: Yes, use the range sliders to set exact start and end points with 0.1 second precision.
faq.q2: Is the video re-encoded?
faq.a2: The tool uses stream copy mode for fast processing without quality loss.

rotate.name: Rotate Video
rotate.metaTitle: Rotate Video - Rotate Video Online Free
rotate.metaDescription: Rotate videos by 90, 180, or 270 degrees. Fix video orientation easily. Free online tool.
rotate.keywords: rotate video, flip video, video rotation, fix video orientation
rotate.unsupported: This tool requires SharedArrayBuffer support. Please use a modern browser with HTTPS.

faq.a1: You can rotate videos by 90° (clockwise), 180° (upside down), or 270° (counter-clockwise).
faq.q2: Does rotating affect video quality?
faq.a2: The video is re-encoded during rotation, but quality is maintained at a high level.

to-gif.name: Video to GIF
to-gif.description: Convert video clips to animated GIF images.
to-gif.metaTitle: Video to GIF - Convert Video to GIF Online
to-gif.metaDescription: Convert video clips to animated GIF images. Control frame rate, size, and duration. Free online tool.
to-gif.keywords: video to gif, convert video to gif, gif maker, gif creator
to-gif.unsupported: This tool requires SharedArrayBuffer support. Please use a modern browser with HTTPS.

faq.q1: How can I reduce GIF file size?
faq.a1: Lower the FPS, reduce the width, or shorten the duration. The tool uses an optimized palette for best quality-to-size ratio.
faq.q2: What's the maximum length for a GIF?
faq.a2: There's no hard limit, but longer GIFs produce very large files. We recommend keeping GIFs under 10 seconds.

to-webp.name: Video to WebP
to-webp.description: Convert video clips to animated WebP images.
to-webp.metaTitle: Video to WebP Animation - Convert Video to WebP Online
to-webp.metaDescription: Convert video to animated WebP images. Smaller than GIF with better quality. Free online tool.
to-webp.keywords: video to webp, animated webp, webp animation, convert video webp
to-webp.unsupported: This tool requires SharedArrayBuffer support. Please use a modern browser with HTTPS.

faq.q1: Why use WebP instead of GIF?
faq.a1: Animated WebP files are typically 25-35% smaller than equivalent GIFs while supporting better color depth and transparency.
faq.q2: Is animated WebP widely supported?
faq.a2: Yes, all modern browsers support animated WebP. Only very old browsers lack support.

compress.name: Compress Video
compress.description: Reduce video file size with adjustable quality presets.
compress.metaTitle: Compress Video - Free Online Video Compressor
compress.metaDescription: Compress video files to reduce size. Choose high, medium, or low quality. Free online tool, no upload needed.
compress.keywords: compress video, video compressor, reduce video size, shrink video
compress.unsupported: This tool requires SharedArrayBuffer support. Please use a modern browser with HTTPS.

faq.a1: The tool re-encodes the video using H.264 with a CRF (Constant Rate Factor) value. Higher quality means larger files; lower quality means smaller files with more compression artifacts.
faq.q2: Which output format is used?
faq.a2: Compressed videos are always output as MP4 (H.264 video + AAC audio) for maximum compatibility.

format-convert.name: Convert Video Format
format-convert.description: Convert videos between MP4, WebM, MKV, and AVI formats.
format-convert.metaTitle: Video Format Converter - Free Online Video Converter
format-convert.metaDescription: Convert videos between MP4, WebM, MKV, and AVI. Free online tool, no upload needed. Runs in your browser.
format-convert.keywords: video converter, convert video, mp4 to webm, mkv to mp4, video format
format-convert.unsupported: This tool requires SharedArrayBuffer support. Please use a modern browser with HTTPS.

faq.a1: You can convert between MP4, WebM, MKV, and AVI formats. MP4 and AVI use H.264 encoding, WebM uses VP9, and MKV uses stream copy for fast conversion.
faq.q2: Will the video quality change?
faq.a2: Converting to MKV uses stream copy so quality is preserved exactly. Other conversions re-encode with high quality settings.

resize.name: Resize Video
resize.description: Change video resolution with preset or custom dimensions.
resize.metaTitle: Resize Video - Free Online Video Resizer
resize.metaDescription: Resize videos to 720p, 480p, 360p or custom dimensions. Free online tool, no upload needed.
resize.keywords: resize video, video resizer, change video resolution, scale video
resize.unsupported: This tool requires SharedArrayBuffer support. Please use a modern browser with HTTPS.

faq.a1: 720p (1280px wide), 480p (854px wide), and 360p (640px wide). You can also enter a custom width.
faq.q2: Is the aspect ratio preserved?
faq.a2: Yes, the height is automatically calculated to maintain the original aspect ratio.

trim.name: Audio Trimmer
trim.description: Cut and trim audio files to the desired length.

trim.metaDescription: Trim and cut audio files to any length. Set precise start and end points. Free online tool.

trim.unsupported: This tool requires SharedArrayBuffer support. Please use a modern browser with HTTPS.

faq.a1: Most formats including MP3, WAV, OGG, AAC, FLAC, and M4A are supported.
faq.q2: Is audio quality preserved?
faq.a2: Yes, the tool uses stream copy mode so the original quality is preserved without re-encoding.

convert.name: Audio Converter
convert.description: Convert audio files between MP3, WAV, OGG, AAC, and FLAC formats.
convert.metaTitle: Audio Converter - Convert Audio Files Online Free
convert.metaDescription: Convert audio between MP3, WAV, OGG, AAC, and FLAC. Free online tool that works in your browser.

convert.unsupported: This tool requires SharedArrayBuffer support. Please use a modern browser with HTTPS.

faq.a1: Convert between MP3, WAV, OGG, AAC, and FLAC formats.
faq.q2: Is there a file size limit?
faq.a2: Processing happens in your browser, so very large files may be slow. We recommend files under 100MB.

extract.metaTitle: Extract Audio from Video - Free Online Audio Extractor
extract.metaDescription: Extract audio from video files as MP3, WAV, or AAC. Free online tool, no upload needed.

faq.q1: Which video formats can I extract audio from?
faq.a1: Most video formats including MP4, WebM, MOV, and AVI are supported.
faq.q2: What audio formats can I export to?
faq.a2: You can export to MP3, WAV, or AAC format.

footer.tagline: Free browser-based media tools. No uploads, no signups.

privacy.metaDescription: Learn how Media Toolbox protects your privacy. All file processing happens in your browser — nothing is uploaded to any server.
privacy.title: Privacy & Security
privacy.subtitle: Your files never leave your browser. We built Media Toolbox with privacy as the foundation, not an afterthought.
privacy.corePromiseBody: Every tool on Media Toolbox processes files entirely within your browser using client-side JavaScript and WebAssembly. Your files are never uploaded to any server, never stored anywhere, and never seen by anyone but you. When you close the tab, the data is gone.

step1.title: You select a file
step1.description: Your file is read directly by JavaScript in your browser. It never touches a network request.

step2.title: Processing happens locally
step2.description: All conversions, compressions, and edits run on your device using Web APIs, Canvas, WebAssembly (FFmpeg, PDF.js), and other browser technologies.

step3.title: You download the result
step3.description: The output is generated in-memory and offered as a download. No server is involved at any step.

noUpload.title: No File Uploads
noUpload.description: Files never leave your device. Processing uses your browser's built-in capabilities.

localStorage.title: No Persistent Storage
localStorage.description: We don't use cookies or local storage to track you. Your preferences (language, theme) are stored locally.

openSource.title: Verifiable Security
openSource.description: You can inspect network traffic in your browser's DevTools to confirm zero file uploads.

noLogs.title: No Server Logs
noLogs.description: Since everything runs client-side, there are no server logs of your file operations.

transparent.title: Fully Transparent
transparent.description: This is a static site hosted on Cloudflare Pages. No backend, no database, no API servers.

privacy.thirdPartyBody: Some tools load WebAssembly binaries (e.g., FFmpeg core) from CDNs like unpkg.com. These are open-source libraries fetched once and cached by your browser. No file data is sent to these CDNs — they only provide the processing code.

howItWorks.metaDescription: Learn how Media Toolbox processes your files entirely in the browser using JavaScript and WebAssembly. No uploads, no servers.
howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps — your files stay on your device the entire time.

select.title: Pick Your File
select.description: Choose a file from your device or drag and drop it onto the tool. The file is read by JavaScript running inside your browser — it is never sent over the network.

process.title: Instant Local Processing
process.description: The tool processes your file right on your device using browser technologies like Canvas API, Web Audio API, and WebAssembly (FFmpeg, PDF.js, Tesseract). Processing speed depends on your device — most operations finish in seconds.

download.title: Download the Result
download.description: Once processing is complete, the output file is generated in memory and ready to download. Click the download button and save it anywhere on your device. No account or signup needed.

howItWorks.whyClientSideBody: Traditional online tools upload your files to a remote server, process them, and send the result back. This is slow, raises privacy concerns, and requires you to trust the service. Media Toolbox takes a different approach: every operation runs in your browser. Your files never leave your device, there are no upload size limits, and the tools work even on slow connections.

canvas.title: Canvas & Web APIs
canvas.description: Image operations like crop, resize, and format conversion use the browser's native Canvas API for fast, GPU-accelerated rendering.

wasm.title: WebAssembly
wasm.description: Video and audio tools use FFmpeg compiled to WebAssembly, running natively in the browser at near-native speed. PDF tools use PDF.js and pdf-lib.

webApis.title: Modern Web Standards
webApis.description: We leverage File API, Blob URLs, Web Workers, and other modern standards to handle large files efficiently without blocking the UI.

offline.title: Works Offline
offline.description: Since no server is involved, most tools continue to work even when your internet connection drops — as long as the page is already loaded.

howItWorks.privacyCta: Want to learn more about how we protect your data?
